---
title: "Christ and the Catechism: The Church Catechism by 520 questions and answers explained"
---

## Christ and the Catechism: The Church Catechism by 520 questions and answers explained

**Author:** The Rev. James Street
**Date:** 1898
**Imprint:** London : Church of England Sunday School Institute

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
